name: Garden Floral Kids' Comforter Set - Pillowfort™
description: Add fresh garden flair to their comfortable sleep space with this Floral Garden Comforter Set from Pillowfort™. This bedding set includes a cozy comforter and matching sham(s) for coordinated flair. Each of the pieces features a colorful floral print over a white base for a cheerful spring-inspired look. The 100% cotton shell ensures soft, comfortable year-round use, while the cozy comforter with polyester fill adds a layer of warmth to the top of their bed. Add coordinating sheets and other bedding pieces to complete their bedding ensemble, and machine wash for easy care.
